title: mesosphaerum rugosum
intro: Mesosphaerum rugosum, also known as Mexican tea or Mexican oregano, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been attributed to its essential oils and phenolic compounds. Some of the health benefits of Mesosphaerum rugosum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Mesosphaerum rugosum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and essential oil extracts, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
